title: Ti Wrap
description: A delicious and easy-to-make wrap filled with a tangy cheese spread and crispy leafy greens.
instructions: 1. Preheat a pan over medium heat.
2. Spread the bryndza cheese evenly across the center of the wrap, leaving a small border around the edges.
3. Add the shredded ti on top of the cheese.
4. Drizzle the mildly tangy sauce over the ti.
5. Add the chopped leaf on top of the ti.
6. Fold the bottom edge of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
7. Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the wrap is crispy and the filling is heated through.
